spec_match.rationale: The page now embeds a real child FAQ document in iframes and the child route is served with Supports-Responsive-Sizing: 1.

interactive.rationale: Users expand accordion controls inside the embedded document and can compare fixed iframe clipping against responsive sizing or its labeled fallback.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The FAQ accordion use case matches the feature index framing.

edge_cases.rationale: The page detects native support, verifies the response header, and falls back to height messages only when native support is absent.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses shared showcase styles and CSS variables for the parent UI.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: The mocked accordion shell was replaced with real iframe embeds backed by the shared responsive iframe route, including the required server header, support checks, and ChromeStatus citation.
